connectPrompt: Connect the machine to read and change the GRBL controller settings.
criticalHint: Critical setting — affects geometry or motion safety.

confirmCritical.title: Write critical settings?
confirmCritical.body: These settings affect geometry and motion safety. Review the values before writing to the controller:

stepPulse.label: Step pulse
stepPulse.desc: STEP pulse duration in microseconds. Typically 10.

stepIdleDelay.label: Step idle delay
stepIdleDelay.desc: Milliseconds to keep drivers energized after a move. 255 keeps them always on.

stepInvertMask.label: Step invert mask
stepInvertMask.desc: Axes whose STEP signal is inverted.

dirInvertMask.label: Direction invert mask
dirInvertMask.desc: Axes whose direction is inverted. A wrong mask reverses an axis — crash risk.

statusReportMask.label: Status report mask
statusReportMask.desc: Which fields the `?` report includes: machine position and/or buffer.

junctionDeviation.label: Junction deviation
junctionDeviation.desc: Cornering smoothing parameter, mm. Higher is faster and sharper at corners.

reportInches.label: Report in inches
reportInches.desc: Report coordinates in inches instead of millimeters.

softLimits.label: Soft limits
softLimits.desc: Software guard against leaving the work envelope. Requires homing.

hardLimits.label: Hard limits
hardLimits.desc: Hardware limit switches halt motion when triggered.

homingCycle.label: Homing cycle
homingCycle.desc: Enable the homing cycle ($H) using limit switches.

homingDirInvert.label: Homing direction
homingDirInvert.desc: Axis mask: which way to seek the switch during homing.

homingFeed.label: Homing feed
homingFeed.desc: Slow precise approach feed to the switch, mm/min.

homingSeek.label: Homing seek
homingSeek.desc: Fast search feed to locate the switch, mm/min.

homingPulloff.label: Homing pull-off
homingPulloff.desc: How far to back off the switch after homing, mm.

spindleMax.label: Max spindle speed
spindleMax.desc: RPM mapped to 100% PWM / the maximum S word.

spindleMin.label: Min spindle speed
spindleMin.desc: RPM mapped to the minimum non-zero S word.

laserMode.label: Laser mode
laserMode.desc: Dynamic power control during motion (M3/M4 for a laser).

spindlePwmFreq.label: Spindle PWM frequency
spindlePwmFreq.desc: PWM carrier frequency in Hz. Affects spindle/driver response; an odd or 0 value can skew the $34/$35 duty mapping.

spindleOffPwm.label: Spindle off PWM
spindleOffPwm.desc: PWM duty (%) output when the spindle is off (M5). Usually 0.

spindleMinPwm.label: Min spindle PWM
spindleMinPwm.desc: PWM duty (%) at the minimum RPM ($31). Raise it so the spindle actually starts at low RPM — at $31 the duty equals this value.

spindleMaxPwm.label: Max spindle PWM
spindleMaxPwm.desc: PWM duty (%) at the maximum RPM ($30). Usually 100.

xSteps.label: X steps/mm
xSteps.desc: Motor steps per millimeter on X. Wrong value means wrong distances.

ySteps.label: Y steps/mm
ySteps.desc: Motor steps per millimeter on Y. Wrong value means wrong distances.

zSteps.label: Z steps/mm
zSteps.desc: Motor steps per millimeter on Z. Wrong value means wrong distances.

xMaxRate.label: X max rate
xMaxRate.desc: Maximum feed rate on X, mm/min.

yMaxRate.label: Y max rate
yMaxRate.desc: Maximum feed rate on Y, mm/min.

zMaxRate.label: Z max rate
zMaxRate.desc: Maximum feed rate on Z, mm/min.

xMaxTravel.label: X max travel
xMaxTravel.desc: Working travel length on X, mm. Used by soft limits.

yMaxTravel.label: Y max travel
yMaxTravel.desc: Working travel length on Y, mm. Used by soft limits.

zMaxTravel.label: Z max travel
zMaxTravel.desc: Working travel length on Z, mm. Used by soft limits.
